title: UFO Believers Are Losing Their Minds Over Steven Spielberg’s New Movie. I Understand Why.
description: Disclosure Day makes it clear Spielberg is deep in the weeds of today’s debates about alleged alien encounters. But it’s really about something deeper.

title: Bombshell UFO report exposed by famed whistleblower reveals CIA's ties to alien technology
description: A UFO whistleblower has named a declassified report that he said shows the CIA's involvement with extraterrestrial technology.

title: UFO whistleblower claims billions in secret spending hidden from Congress
description: UAP whistleblower David Grusch accuses intelligence agencies of hiding billions in secret spending from Congress through alleged slush funds.

title: What is the Varginha UFO incident? Campaigners demand files
description: Americans 'deserve the truth,' a U.S. congressman has told a press conference as part of a wider transparency campaign.
